name: Hamburger Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water, milk, egg, butter, salt, bread flour, sugar, and yeast to the bread machine pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
2. Select dough/manual cycle.
3. When the cycle is complete, remove dough from the machine to a lightly floured surface. If necessary, knead in enough flour to make the dough easy to handle. If the dough is too elastic, cover and let rest 10 minutes before shaping.
4. Divide dough into 9 equal pieces. Form each piece into smooth balls. Place on a large greased baking sheet.
5. Flatten balls into 4-inch rounds; cover. Let rise in a warm, draft-free place until doubled in size, 20 to 30 minutes.
6. Lightly beat egg white and 1 tablespoon water. Brush the buns with this mixture. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until done.
